falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff top pattern would form, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict by confirming a clear market top

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks below 4000 (key support from bottom_2024_aug pattern)

falsification_conditions.condition: The McClellan Bull Bear Ratio crosses above 0.8

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
